title: At A Dance Of Girls
content:
Let the wind's breath
    Blow in the glades of the clouds
    Until they close;
    So that the beauty of these girls
    May not escape.

    From the Japanese of So-dzyo Hend-zyo.
meaning:
"At A Dance Of Girls" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
